title: peperomia roxburghiana
intro: Peperomia roxburghiana, also known as the Tibetan pepper or Tibetan pepper plant, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create poultices and ointments to soothe skin conditions.
